hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+push\s+-f\b|git\s+clean\s+-f|git\s+branch\s+-D|git\s+checkout\s+\.)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive or policy-violating git operation detected' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [[ -z "$FILE" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(test|spec)\. ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ __tests__/ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ /tests?/ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env\.example$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(md|json|yaml|yml|css|scss|html|txt|svg|lock)$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(d\.ts)$ ]]; then exit 0; fi; CONTENT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; PATTERNS='AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|xoxb-[0-9]{10,}|xoxp-[0-9]{10,}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20}'; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "$PATTERNS"; then echo 'BLOCKED: Suspected credential/secret detected in file content' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [[ -z "$FILE" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(test|spec)\. ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ __tests__/ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ /tests?/ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(md|json|yaml|yml|css|scss|html|txt|svg|lock|toml|cfg|ini|conf)$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(d\.ts)$ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ Makefile ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ Dockerfile ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|py|go|rs|rb)$ ]]; then exit 0; fi; DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASE=$(basename "$FILE" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); FOUND=0; for EXT in test.ts test.tsx test.js test.jsx spec.ts spec.tsx spec.js spec.jsx; do if [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.${EXT}" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/__tests__/${BASE}.${EXT}" ]]; then FOUND=1; break; fi; done; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ ]]; then if [[ -f "${DIR}/test_${BASE}.py" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}_test.py" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/tests/test_${BASE}.py" ]]; then FOUND=1; fi; fi; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.go$ ]]; then if [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}_test.go" ]]; then FOUND=1; fi; fi; if [[ $FOUND -eq 0 ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: No test file found for ${FILE}. Write tests first (TDD)." >&2; exit 2; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|css|scss|html|md|yaml|yml)$ ]]; then npx --no-install prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx --no-install eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null; if ! npx --no-install eslint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>&1; then echo 'ESLint errors remain after auto-fix' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx --no-install tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || { echo 'TypeScript type errors detected' >&2; exit 2; }; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if [[ -z "$FILE" ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(test|spec)\. ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ __tests__/ ]] || [[ ! "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|py|go|rs|rb)$ ]]; then exit 0; fi; DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASE=$(basename "$FILE" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); if [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.test.ts" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.test.tsx" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.test.js" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.spec.ts" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.spec.tsx" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/${BASE}.spec.js" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/__tests__/${BASE}.test.ts" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/__tests__/${BASE}.test.tsx" ]] || [[ -f "${DIR}/__tests__/${BASE}.test.js" ]]; then TESTFILE=$(ls "${DIR}/${BASE}".{test,spec}.{ts,tsx,js} "${DIR}/__tests__/${BASE}".test.{ts,tsx,js} 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [[ -n "$TESTFILE" ]]; then if [[ -f package.json ]] || [[ -f ../package.json ]]; then npx --no-install jest --passWithNoTests "$TESTFILE" 2>/dev/null || npx --no-install vitest run "$TESTFILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ ]]; then python -m pytest "$TESTFILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$FILE" =~ \.go$ ]]; then go test "$TESTFILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; fi
echo '{"systemMessage": "Context compaction in progress. Important: preserve current task context, decisions made, and next steps in your working memory."}'
